value: MissWindowTracker in telemetry.ts: pure state machine tracking exploration cost when codex_get misses. Opens window on hit:false, closes on writeback (codex_set to same ns), moved_on (any hit), or timeout (5min). Persists to miss-paths.jsonl. MCP server wires tracker in wrapper finally block + flushes on beforeExit. getExplorationCost() returns observed median (>=5 writeback samples) or falls back to static EXPLORATION_COST map. computeStats() reports: deliveryCostTokens (bytes served / 4), netTokensSaved (gross - delivery), calibration map (observed vs static per namespace).
